coverage_note: The bundled MSH6 population database stores gene-level and marker-level interpretation notes, but does not embed a full ancestry-frequency matrix for these markers yet.
gene_population_patterns_intro: Broader population patterns curated from MSH6 single-base mismatch recognition, insertion/deletion-loop repair, microsatellite stability, and Lynch syndrome biology and condition-association literature.

sources.label: Ensembl GRCh37 ENSG00000116062: MSH6 coordinate source

gene_population_patterns.summary: MSH6 findings should be read against single-base mismatch recognition, insertion/deletion-loop repair, microsatellite stability, and Lynch syndrome biology; population frequency, ascertainment, and phenotype definition can change the apparent effect size.

MSH6 loss-of-function model is curated as a MSH6 marker for Lynch syndrome review context, Mismatch-repair pathway function; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.
